arts.sum: Mbappe was accused of touching his genitals in a derogatory manner, Vinicius Jr allegedly clashed with Atletico fans during and after the game, while Rudiger is said to have made a gesture.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Valencia
arts.sum: Contrary to what was expected, Lunin will be available and appears ready to feature in the starting lineup. Lunin makes the list and appears to be ready to start.

arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by La Liga giants Real Madrid to get the better of Valencia has been unveiled online. And it features one altogether…

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to have limited say in Real Madrid transfers
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso does appear to be a Real Madrid manager in waiting, with most considering it a question of when rather than if. The Basque coach has been hotly tipped to take over from Carlo Ancelotti, and has been in contact with Los Blancos in recent months. Ancelotti’s future remains in the […] The post Xabi Alonso to have limited say in Real Madrid transfers appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Valencia - La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid's predicted lineup for their La Liga clash against Valencia on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: The New Rodrygo: How Mbappe’s Arrival Elevated His Defensive Game
arts.sum: The Managing Madrid team has frequently discussed Rodrygo’s growth on the defensive side of the ball and how underrated he’s become in that department, but the raw numbers highlight the shift in stark terms. Before Carlo Ancelotti had the chance to test out his new Real Madrid starting eleven following the arrival of Kylian Mbappe, many had quickly assumed that Rodrygo would be relegated to the bench—and would ultimately leave in the following summer window.

Arsenal 'make approach' for £17.5m midfielder compared to Jude Bellingham, Steven Gerrard
arts.sum: Arsenal supposedly make an approach to sign Juventus midfielder Khephren Thuram, who has been likened to Jude Bellingham and Steven Gerrard.
